claim: Tier 7.1i broadened the pinned NAB software scoring subset to 20 streams across 6 categories. v2.3 beat v2.2 and shams, but the broader signal was localized rather than statistically confirmed: rolling z-score was best overall and v2.3 ranked fourth.
caveat: Broader NAB software confirmation/localization only; not a full NAB benchmark claim by itself, not public usefulness proof, not a baseline freeze, not hardware/native transfer, and not AGI/ASI evidence.
